text: "Very well." (exhales) "Well then, y'all look a bit tired and I think we can use a bit of rest. Finish up, have some breakfast, then I guess we'll be on our way together."

speaker: MATT
text: "I think we've got quite a bit to talk about on the road ahead." (smacks lips) And that's where we'll end tonight. (groaning)

speaker: TRAVIS
text: I guess if he's seen us, he can scry on any of us, right?

speaker: SAM
text: It's because we slept near the thing!

speaker: TALIESIN
text: Oh my god, we're going to get two more hours sleep. Do you know what that means? It means brunch with the devil. I'm so excited. (laughter)

speaker: MATT
text: There's a lot of things someone can do with a fraction of your blood. (groaning)

speaker: TRAVIS
text: El gato es diablo, I told you.

speaker: SAM
text: That blood was so long ago!

speaker: TALIESIN
text: It's gone bad by now, right? Right? You got to refrigerate that-- oh, it's cold.

speaker: TRAVIS
text: Vials of blood. Son of a bitch.

speaker: MATT
text: Well, it's a blood cleric. They got all sorts of tricks, even beyond what the player--

speaker: TRAVIS
text: Oh, yeah, figure out the slice.

speaker: MATT
text: All right, we'll pick up from there next week.

speaker: MATT
text: Next year. That's right! Yeah, yeah. Oh my god. Aaah! Next year in 2021.

speaker: TRAVIS
text: May it be a better one.

speaker: MATT
text: May it indeed be a fucking better one.

speaker: MATT
text: Oh man, that went weird places. Okay, let's see what traveling with the Nonagon is going to be like, oh man.

speaker: TALIESIN
text: Maybe we'll get to do a group combat against something. It'll be like a bonding exercise, like going on one of those weird--

speaker: TRAVIS
text: I've never quite gone up against another adventuring party. Like they're pretty stacked.

speaker: TRAVIS
text: It's not like a foe or two.

speaker: SAM
text: I feel like we could take out some of the side buddies, but--

speaker: LIAM
text: There are nein of us, though.

speaker: TRAVIS
text: It's going to give and take if we do that.

speaker: MATT
text: Yeah, indeed. But we shall see what that looks like next year. (groaning)

speaker: MATT
text: I know. Thank you all so much for following along with us. Have very happy holidays all of you, and a happy new year. Of course, we'll see you in the new one. Enjoy, know that we love you very much, and... is it Thursday yet? Good night. (cheering)
